cv_background_body: Raised at the intersection of art and science — where precision meets creativity.
cv_chart_aria: Interactive chart explorer showing career data
cv_cta_subtext: Open to senior / lead engineering roles · Full stack · Remote-friendly · Munich ☕
cv_dataviz_body: Designed and built frontend experiences for analytical dashboards and bespoke data visualizations, including charts, treemaps, Sankey diagrams, and network graphs. Owned the full lifecycle, from implementation and testing to maintenance, support, and customer-led refinement.
cv_dataviz_headline: I turn complex process data into clear visuals teams can trust and act on.
cv_hero_role: Senior Software Engineer · Full Stack · UX
cv_hero_serif_tagline: I turn complex data into clear, actionable experiences.
cv_hero_short_bio: Over 15 years delivering scalable software across 7 industries — finance, construction, process mining, e-commerce, healthcare, oil & gas, and academia. Hard problems, clean solutions.
cv_superpower_quote: I build systems that scale, experiences that delight, and teams that grow — sometimes all three at once.
paul_profile_description: Over a decade building production-grade software across fintech, e-commerce, healthcare, and construction. Full-stack by craft — I architect backends, build frontends, and care about the product experience end to end. I've led cross-functional teams, shipped at scale, and turned ambiguous problems into clean, maintainable solutions. Currently based in Germany, originally from Ecuador. Open to challenging engineering roles, remote-friendly collaborations, and interesting people.
paul_profile_intro: My name is Paul Gualotuna, a Software Engineer hailing from Ecuador and currently residing in Germany.
paul_profile_picture_caption: El Teide. Soaking in the breathtaking views of Tenerife, Spain - 2021 🏔️
